summary: Evaluator verified all 24 manifest hashes, reproduced the suite (35/0) and bash -n, confirmed genuine red->green (8 new assertions fail in red), and line-level verified the registration path: upsert_mcp_json preserves foreign entries and unknown keys, never overwrites present-but-invalid JSON (exit 3 -> skip+notice, byte-identical via cmp), writes atomically (temp+rename), passes paths as node argv (no shell interpolation), and matches the T-005-confirmed formats (Cursor mcpServers {command,args}; VS Code servers {type:stdio,...}). Verdict PASS with one Minor.

findings.description: The atomic-write temp file (config_file + .sdd-forge.tmp) is not removed on a hard mid-write interruption (e.g. SIGKILL between write and rename); never corrupts the real config, but a stray temp file could linger after abnormal termination.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
